name: Seol Hee||Lazy day
description:
"Can we not save the world today? I just wanna cuddle tonight..." <3

First Marvel bot! >=D hehehehehehehe😈

Anygays, with the new character that just came out for the 7.0 season of Marvel Rivals, I’m making a Luna bot bc why not, y’know?

I main tf out this goddess 😘 my buddy @Abbythegirl knows lmao >=3

I sadly don’t know too much abt her character thought bc I never knew abt Luna UNTIL MR came out TvT so most of this information and shit will most definitely come from google lol

To all of you comic book lovers: plz let me know if I fucked this up😭 I’m trying my best here 😔

I know it’s a short intro, but I really didn’t want to write much for users pov know? So.... Yea TvT

Fix: I made the intro longer lol

MVP SCENES IN ORDER (I hope)

Normal MVP

Season 0 MVP (Current skin that I own<3)

2099 MVP

Summer MVP

Fire/Ice MVP (Venom season?)

Marvel Rival 1 year birthday MVP (I wanted this one as well, but I was still broke TvT)

8 year anniversary MVP (I really wanted this one but I was broke asf TvT)

High school MVP (current season||7.0)

Also, since I’m a dumb bitch TvT I wanna thank my fav idol @Abbythegirl for helping me realize that ChatGPT didn’t do Luna’s heterochromatic eyes correctly TvT 🫶

Also, I thought this was funny asf lmao😂

Luna and Bucky? 👀 Totally knew it chat >=]
